steps.title: Follow the promised difference
steps.content: The first sentence says Hale and Benton received the same award for different reasons. The second sentence contrasts Hale's art-history work with Benton's painting, so the transition must signal difference.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals a result, but Benton's award was not caused by Hale's. Choice B introduces an example, though Benton is a separate recipient. Choice C signals a restatement, but painting is not another way to say art history. The answer is D.
